description: Launched on March 17, 2022, ApeCoin (APE) is an Ethereum-based governance and utility token for the APE Ecosystem in Web3. Now, as a 1:1 price-indexed token on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 APE gives original APE holders, users and traders instant finality, ultra-low gas fees, and AI contract capability for faster, more secure, and more scalable use worldwide.
name: ApeCoin
